wall.text: I buy a lot of crap. Tons of crap. And at the same time I'm always trying to get rid of crap. I'm spening money on crap I dont need, and I'm spending money on toilet paper and wet-wipes just trying to get rid of crap. I rent a debris box once a year to get my wife to get rid of crap, but the debris box will come and she's say's "you take care of your crap, I'm takin' a crap!" My kids dont give a crap, and they are always giving me crap, but they dont even come home with crap, they make me buy them crap. I go to work and get crap from my boss, and he pays crap, but I dont give a crap. I come home to a mess, and I say "look at this crap!" and my kids yell out from under the locked bathroom door "look at this crap!". Now, I'm crapped. I aint got no more time for this crap. My kid got a crappy report card so he doesnt get to go to the lake this weekend and fish for crappies. But I can tell he doesnt give a crap, just like his mother, who is always giving me crap, but buying useless crap on QVC, Amazon, and much crappier stores, like hobby stores and doll boutiques. Really crappy stuff. Who buys a 19th century French Louisiana Cajun Queen doll with a crappy lace face cover? And crappier and scariest of all, the doll is holding a doll! My wife love's crap like that. I'd rather spend seven dollars on crappy crap than see that crap. She likes dolls with faces and eyes. I like dead skin
wall.title: I've spent more on crap than this.

wall.text: to start off, this is not a quality made fender, it is a simple starter guitar meant for people who are just starting out, or for kids who wont really bother to actually learn guitar. i bought this guitar as my first elec guitar. when i first got it i thought it was awesome, but after a year i upgraded to a kvx10 king v, when i played this cheap thing, it sounded like crap. it comes with 3 single coil pickups which suck total ass, the strings it starts with are cheap and crappy, the tuners are completely useless, and the two tone knobs don't do a goddamn thing. this is also a very limited guitar, trying to palm mute on this thing is a disaster, the whammy bar is horrible and it makes this piece of crap go out of tune even faster (I cant believe that that was even possible) and pinch harmonics are damn near impossible as well. i tried to play the main riff of seek & destroy and it sounded god awful. bottom line don't blow your money on this thing, save up a bit more and get a epiphone les paul, but if this is all you can a afford and your kid really wants a guitar, then this is okay, but there are better choices.
wall.title: An alright guitar

wall.text: Bought 5 xtra batteriess and charger from ebay, finally got some decent weather to fly, took kid out to large field, boy got use to flying it within life of first battery, 4th battery in and one of the motors fried, dad real pissed, kid really bummed..WTF, Was bought at a mall kiosk for xmas, here it is april, kiosk gone, warranty NONE!!! Would'nt recommend this for Amazon's price let alone what I paid at a mall kiosk..Aint no god damn good if the thing last a whole 20-25 mins..Money pissed away on product and extra crap I bought online (for extending our minutes of fun). Lesson learned. AVOID IT!!!!
wall.title: MOTOR BURNT UP FIRST TIME OUT..JUNK

wall.text: I get pissed at my phone...It's a Samsung 5s. I hate it....but this case has taken a beating. Because I hate my phone so much (don't ever buy a Samsung phone....they suck balls...) I throw it often, off of hard surfaces, sometimes for fun. This little bad ass case has kept my phone from breaking. Which is a double edged sword for me. It's too tough to let me destroy my piece of sh#t phone. Which is a great testament to this company and this product. But a piss of to someone who really wants to see this piece of crap explode. I'll buy one when I get my new IPhone. And I'll love it even more. The only complaint I have on the case itself is that it flakes a little bit...but I can probably attribute that to the hate tosses I give my current phone. So I will try it again.... Also for the price, who cares if it flakes? Buy another one and enjoy the safety. It's a hell of a lot cheaper than an otter box that you can't get out of your damn pocket!
wall.title: I hate it.

wall.text: Jesus tap-dancing Christ... Endless Night, that's what this stupid book is. Just an endless bloody party. Seriously, let me break it down for you: Chapter 1-4, getting to the stupid party. Chapter 5-10 getting drunk at the party and being a mega bitch, and pissing off some voodoo priestess. Chapter 11-12 finally leaving the party. Lots of puking. At some point, she passes out next to some hot guy, and doesn't even get a piece of that hot dick. What the hell Chapter 13-Whatever... just this stupid fat bitch running around, crying, getting drunk, puking, trying to get away from the voodoo chick. Trying to out-bitch the voodoo bitch, which just ain't gonna happen. I mean, Dylan is a royal bitch, don't get me wrong, but this voodoo bitch has got the serious stink eye. Then we get to the James Bond bit. You know, the bit where the voodoo bitch lays out her whole plan. She goes on about all the shiat that happened in the first book, The Scene. So, apparently, this voodoo bitch needs skanky whore blood from blond bitches in L.A. to fuel her evil empire. Who knew? And who the hell cares? Would it be too hard to write another original story with this crazy Dylan bitch, and her trusty side kick Tatum? Why does it have to be the same fake-vampire story, with just a bit of voodoo thrown in? I don't bloody care about the dead cum dumpsters in
wall.title: Endless Night - needs to end

wall.text: Just like the movie, this is one impressive piece of garbage. The mediocrity reaches an all new level of toilet inducing crap. It was like watching and listening to a small baby die. Painful. I'm sure a bunch of hyper-sensitive teens will love the film and soundtrack but there goes it, doesn't it. Just talking about this makes me want to crap. I really can't blame the composer here. He really doesn't much to work with. The entire production is grand in motif and wanna be seriousness, but most of it comes off as well... crap. James must have fallen asleep through most of it during tracking sessions. Don't blame him at all. Can't be inspired with such dribble as the source material. Midway through the second cue I just wanted to crap. This score is so lifeless and drab it almost mirrors the meandering soulless crap that is the companion "various artist" soundtrack. For crying out loud, Taylor Swift is in it. Good Lord. Crap. Crap. Crap. Crap. The composer is usually good. But here, he's just crap. Can you tell I'm 17 years old? Well I'm not and if you like this, then you like crap. Why you like crap is your business but I don't like crap. Crap makes me crap. And being that I hate most of the scores that come out nowadays a lot of days are spent in the bathroom. I am impressed with just how crappy this whole thing sounds. Leav
wall.title: Impressive piece of crap

wall.text: I originally bought this as a meat thermometer after I started cooking mini home meals for myself. I live in a second floor apartment, and my oven is a piece of crap, so instead of getting undercooked chicken because I was relying on my crappy oven, I bought this and decided to let science tell me when my chicken was ready. It's easy to set up, and it has a magnet attached to it, so you can stick it to the side of your crappy oven too. I love this damn thing. About a year ago I was in a motorcycle accident. It crushed my foot and I lost a lot of blood circulation in my foot. The doctors told me to ice it and rest it, which of course I did. They didn't tell me that after you ice it you should also apply heat, so it took about 8 months to heal. At some point I got so tired of being crippled that I bought Epsom salt from Amazon and started giving myself Epsom salt baths. Then I read online that between 100° f and 112° f were the best temperatures for a heated bath. I just so happened to have the therm Pro meat thermometer that I had bought for my crappy oven. It was then that I smiled, because I knew that it would also work for my crappy foot. The damn thing works great and I love it. 2 days ago I was moving things around and it fell out of my hand into the vat of the Epsom salt. I immediately retrieved it, remove the battery, then laid it on a towel. I had written the damn thing
wall.title: Epic meat thermometer

wall.text: Dick--Scott HIldreth 5 MF Stars Review by Amanda B. I.♥.me.some.Dick…. I.am.Jess... Hildreth did it again. It’s a feel good stand alone book.This book makes me happy. This book made me crack up. This book made me seriously LOL. Dick is dangerous, and mysterious, and sexy, and demanding, and he’s packing more than a pistol. Jess is mouthy, and bratty, and bitchy, and hard core, and I totally want to be her when I grow up! From the moment they meet the sparks are flying and you know it’s either going to burn forever or burn itself out fast. I loved how there was no pretense to the relationship from the beginning. He offered a one night stand and she took what was available unapologetically. I love that she asked for exactly what she wanted and he didn’t hesitate to oblige. **giggles** The only regret that she had was the reality that having a Dick like him ruined her in every way. I could totally relate to her when she told him how she was not turned off at all by his dicky attitude..“Most girls probably don’t dig it, but I do. I love guys who are dicks. If a guy can talk a mad line of s*** to me, he’ll win my heart quicker than a guy with flowers.” It’s so true! Dick is a bad boy in every way! From his con schemes and dirty mouth, to waving at the soccer moms in Target parking lot I was hooked, in
wall.title: 10 is perfect in every way....

wall.text: I usually don't write reviews, specifically negative ones, but this needs to be said and consumers need to hear and heed warning. I bought this littler box hoping it would make my life easier; cleaning cat poop and scooping piss daily is a pain in the @ss. I saw the reviews on this specific one and got sold on the idea that it was "scoop free" since it was a sifting box. Nope you will still need to scoop poop and piss that is clinging on to the sifter AND now work is twice that since you have poop and piss caked in the sifter's small openings. Anyone thinking, after reading this, that I allowed the litter box to get unkempt for days or weeks at a time- the is answer is no. Even with daily maintaining of the box, piss and poop builds up in the nooks of the sifter. Oh! and to add to this, when my cat pees (she's a sprayer), the urine is able to leak outside of the freaking box.... so now I have to deal with a pissy wall. I'm out 16 bucks... literally a crappy situations, pissy wall and a pissed off cat owner.
wall.title: More headache than helpful - pissed off consumer

wall.text: Product is what it is, and that is overpriced crap for the snooty homeowner that thinks "custom" means something. Serves its purpose of replacing the same crappy 99% plastic unit that broke on us after I bumped it with a plastic jug. THIS UNIT IS 99% PLASTIC! If I wasn't too busy to correct the crappy plumbing job the previous owner did under this kitchen sink, I would have trashed this Grohe crap for ANYTHING ELSE. Alas, with poorly plumbed disposal, dishwasher, RO system, and piss poor electrical box, all in the way, it just was not worth the six hours (minimum) that it would have taken for me to be able to install a worthwhile unit. Do yourselves a favor and replace the Grohe crap with something quality. At the prices they charge, this should have been an 99% metal housing instead of 99% plastic.
wall.title: and that is overpriced crap for the snooty homeowner that thinks "custom" means something

wall.text: Don't buy! I don't usually do reviews unless I'm really mad. This bag is crap, really pretty crap but total crap nonetheless and I'm being kind! I have traveled for years with a rolling pink Jansport backpack, but I wanted something a bit bigger, pretty and a spinner. This seemed perfect, it didnt have many reviews, 106 or so but 4.5 stars out of 5. I really wish I had read them. There were only a few bad reviews and they seemed to be about the wheels, which are some of the problem, they don't really spin, maybe it's the size of them as others mentioned. I found myself struggling to pull it anywhere, it was especially a pain in the butt trying to get it down the airplane aisle, I always ended up carrying the damn thing. Flight attendants kept telling me it had wheels, I said, "That don't work." Furthermore, the laptop area for it is in the thinner middle compartment, which is slightly over the crappy wheels if the large compartment is full, so they bag would just fall front first on the ground if you aren't proping it up on something. Don't buy, piece of crap!
wall.title: Pretty Piece of Crap

wall.text: First I like to say I'm a tele guy. Yup that's right. So I ordered a roasted maple tele neck. I was so excited when it came until I saw this box the size of a coffin being wheeled up to my porch. Brought it inside grabbed the box cutter and for a few minutes felt like Indiana Jones. One box down and there's another slightly smaller. I cut through it and find globs of insulation foam. WTF. By the time I cut through this foam and reach my prize. Out of breath and sweating bad. I sat down with my neck remove the plastic and Stratocaster. WTF. So after a while with costumer service I find out they have no teles and there's backorder. So I said I wonder if it would fit on the tele body. Fit like a glove. The frets,fretboard and over all neck seemed very good and felt good. The only thing I thought was crap was the stain job on the Headstock. Hard to see in the pic but it sure looks like crap. Hey Fender WTF where's the quality control down there in Mexico. I believe all of fender products have gone to the garbage with work ethics of more more more and good enough. We are not going to get instruments like Leo Fender sold. Them days long and gone. Crappy looking Headstock I can live with. I think I got a good fender product compared to what I've been reading. You can always send it back Jack.
wall.title: You can always send it back. Jack.

wall.text: This stuff is so terrible on many Levels. First of all, it manages to include wheat gluten for no reason at all. Literally all other protein powders don't have it, I wonder why? Second, the taste. Good lord the taste. It tastes like children's cough syrup. Utterly disgusting Third, the packaging. These cheap bastards decided that a plastic tub isn't good enough for them, so they sell this crap in a barely resealable plastic bag. It's horrible. There is a reason why every other protein comes in a plastic tub. It's because bags like this are pure garbage, and unless you open it perfectly, it won't re-seal, period. Fourth, I don't know what the hell is in this crap, but mixing this in a blender always create a HUGE amount. A little ice with about 2 and a half cups of water, with 4 scoops in a blender created about 70 OUNCES OF LIQUID! WTF?? There has to be some kind of thickening or foaming agent in this crap, because the math doesn't add up. There's no way a little ice and water can create 70+ ounces of shake, yet that's exactly what happens with this. Trying to choke down 70 ounces of this stuff is nearly impossible. I use the same method when using other protein powders and those never make more than 40 ounces. DO NOT BUY THIS CRAP
wall.title: 100% Garbage

wall.text: What a complete lie. "100% brushed microfiber" Absolute and complete lie! These are not even close to microfiber nor are they will like in any way at all. This is total false advertising. I purchased these because they said that they are "100% brushed microfiber" and even the package says so. But they are not even close to that. They are you basic cheap crap made in China crappy sheets that are crap and cheaply made that will fall apart in the wash. What a scam. I hate Amazon. Amazon gets away with murder with selling you cheap knockoff crap when false advertising and nothing is ever done about it. When are we going to stand up and finally do something about it and finally take these bastards to court to file a lawsuit against them for selling is crap with false advertising? I'm fed up! I'm fed up man. And now I'm have to return them. The wife is mad at me. It created a big ole fight because I just picked them out without letting her do it because I just wanted to get it done for her and if course once again Amazon let's me down and I look like a fool. Now I've got to do the same ole song and dance and pack it all back up and return it, wait for my money and then, not sleep in our new bed for a few nights, while we wait for our other new sheets to get here and hope that those are good and trust that those were being sold by an honest and truthful company. I'm losing faith thoug
wall.title: They are 0% microfiber. 100% False advertising

wall.text: So I bought this product twice before and had no issue what so ever. This time around, my third purchase of Nag Champa... Its different. Very different, the box, the packaging, the incense it self is sooo not the same. Im pissed actually. The moment i opened the Amazon package i new it was different. I have used Nag Champa for years and this right here is not it. The powered is lighter and everything. I even went as far as to break up a stick and compare it to the powered that we all know just falls right out of the box... No powder in this bag... Hand rolled? No sir... I do not know what this crap is but I'm mad. I can not return then so now i am stuck with some fake crap. Look at the pic. The loose powder that is not black with tar like substance is the original Nag Champa that was purchased from the same seller last time around. WTF is this new crap? I know my Nag Champa... This is not it. I want my old raggaty box back with my loose powder falling out. Not this manufactured crap. Please and thank you.
wall.title: Third Time Was a FAKE!!

wall.text: The connection issues this game causes makes me want to rip my face off and eat it. I have NEVER had problems with my console until I bought this game. it now constantly disconnects from WiFi, after each game there is some problem. I got disconnected DURING A DRAFT, making my 3rd round pick a crappy quarterback. If you have ever been in a draft, you know how extremely important those early picks are. Trash. They need to fix their game. Until then, I'm beyond pissed. Update: Reducing to one-star now. I got this game instead of NHL 15, because I heard NHL 15 was missing many features. Well. So is this game. It's barely playable. I paid for a $60 piece of crap. Actually, what I find in my toilet after eating taco bell for 3 days straight would probably have more value. Before you say it could be MY connection- I also have UFC and Destiny- Both work just fine online. In fact, I've played a solid 5-6 hours on Destiny with no problems. I put this crap game in my system and I can't stay connected to xbox live or the EA servers for 20 minutes. I got to about end of 2nd period in my connected franchise game. And then it drops you from the EA server and tells you the stats will not be saved. There's no option to attempt to reconnect in game. It's just lost. Wastes your time. Maybe I'll upgrade this piece of crap to 2 stars i
wall.title: Beyond angry

wall.text: Felt embarrassed showing it to friends, but everyone knew I would get it to bounce back. I blamed it on shipping but it was really just the plant. I sprayed it with Neem oil on the first day. I cared for it for a week and the look improved some as it started showing new growth. I woke up this morning, about 8 days since I received it, and it had multiple fungus gnats on it. About 8 of them. I have like 30 plants in my room, some way more valuable than this chain of hearts, and I have NEVER had one bug. For five years now. This piece of crap business sent me a crappy plant and a bug problem. I do not recommend buying anything from them. They obviously do care about their customers. Only profit. How hard is it to make sure you don't send a crappy plant with bugs? I would have let the crappy plant part slide, but the bugs just pissed me off! How is "The Succulent Cult" still in business? Buy them somewhere else if you are looking for plants.
wall.title: Bugs!!! Nothing the first week and then BOOM!

wall.text: Horrible, not what i purchased. The design is completely different from what is pictured. They are flimsy and thin with molding just asking for puppies to chew on. The inner plastic is hollow which creates way to many places for poop to get shoved into. Cleaning these will be a nightmare. And the connection of the panels is some crappy plastic snap. NO, just no. I wanted the product as advertised, the product i had bought before. The actual panel that had a sturdy grid that tiny puppies do not get stuck in. That you can still see thru easily to make sure all the puppies are safe. The product that has metal poles to connect the panels. I am so pissed. My 10 rescue puppies right now are also pissed. You let us down. We wanted to expand our pen, but you sent us cheap crap. We bought these before, we know what you should have sent. The pictures attached at the end with the puppies is of the actual product we bought before. Stop lying and provide the product you said you are selling. I am returning the crap you sent and i hope others do not buy from you and experience this disappointment too. As a foster for animal rescue, i am too busy saving lives to deal with this cheap sleazy tactic.. i order products that i know are quality and safe for newborn and young puppies. What you sent is not quality or safe, and most importantly, NOT WHAT YOU SAID YOU ARE SELLING!!!
wall.title: Not the product advertised! Do not buy!!!!

wall.text: I have a cat who likes to piss on my bed, which makes it a pain in the butt to clean my sheets almost every day. So, I have tried several products from sprays and other stuff with no luck. Just happen to find this product on Amazon 4/22/14 and got it the next day. I put it on my bed where the cat likes to pee. Just one time walking on it, the cat jumped in the air and ran. Which now she hasn't gone near the area since then and looks at me like WTF happened! So, far I love this product, it did what it was suppose to do so far. Now I will see in a week what happens and update my review. Great, safe and effective product! ****UPDATE**** Well after having this product for a few weeks, this is what has happened. That cat who likes to piss on my bed almost every day, pissed on the bed in a different spot a few times. But now she avoids pissing on the bed all together! She doesn't like this mat, I like how I can go to work and know when I come home my bed is piss free! Great product!!
wall.title: Thank God for this product!

wall.text: Try... just TRY to find a good printer without a bunch of crap you don't want or need. You can't. So I buy this piece of crap. Instructions are non existent. FINALLY, I get the stupid thing set up... kind of. When I unplugged it to change its location, like, 8 feet across the room, suddenly I have to go through the ENTIRE setup again, only this time the touchscreen doesn't work! Now, you can't do a damn thing WITHOUT the touchscreen, so I now have to package this pice of crap up and send it back. Don't waste your time or money on this. It's just more cheaply built, over priced Chinese garbage. Then again, American companies are so greedy now, EVERYTHING is cheaply built overpriced Chinese garbage. Better off buying a crappy $39 printer than this junk, and save over $200. I wouldn't wish this junk on my worst enemy. UPDATE: As per the instruction manual, I did not contact Amazon, but Lexmark. They told me I would have to bring the printer out to a UPS store or pay a pickup fee to ship the printer back. I refused both options, telling them that I should not be penalized further for their poor manufacturing. Finally, they agreed to do the pickup and send me a new printer. However, they did NOT send me a new printer, but a poorly packaged refurbished one. Out of frustration, I went back to Amazon, and went through the completely painless
wall.title: Garbage. Total Garbage

wall.text: I would rate it 0 stars if I could. They went cheap, cheap, cheap! Every part that can they could make cheaply, they did! It features crappy canister latches that fall off if you accidentally bump the vacuum into a wall or run it over a cord. The wheels are made out of cheap plastic that is designed to bind up on the smallest human hair follicle tipping the vac over time and time again. Then the thing tips over and dumps all over the floor that you have been trying to clean up. The cord is made from the cheapest, stiffest plastic they cold find. I think they searched China far and wide to find this crap. Don't even think of using the vacuum outdoor in anything below 50 degrees Fahrenheit. If you do it will feel like the cord is made out of steel rebar and you'll undoubtedly bump into this unwieldly spirally mass of reinforced steel, tipping over the vacuum spilling it's contents into your new car which will probably piss you off. This in turn will stir an uncontrollable emotion wherein you pick up you piece of crap shop vac and chuck it across your driveway into the chest of your unsuspecting 90 year old neighbor, who only came by to see why you were cussing. This of course will put him in cardiac arrest and you under arrest! Don't buy this crap! Find a different brand like Rigid or something. Hell if you can find a Kmart All-Pro vac I guarantee it will be 1000 tim

wall.text: I thought these were mostly an extra piece of non essential crap but probably because they were plastic and got at a Chinese imported freight tool store I couldn’t find the crappy ones for an upcoming project so I let go grudgingly of the cash thinking I would receive another crappy tin disposable POS. wall.text: This is some of the cheapest crap I have ever seen. It feels like it is going to fall apart in your hands as soon as you take it out of the box. It's made out of that cheap, soft Chinese crap plastic, which makes sense, since that's where this crap comes from. This little pice of plastic, is really just three leds that alternate on color and sometimes shape. The product page makes it sound like it will change the beat, speed and designs of the colors based on the music being played. This is not the truth, do not believe it. This thing only turns on based on sound in the room and frankly, even without sound, it will still work. There is no on or off switch, so you'll have to unplug it. I got this for a friend's birthday they are having at my house and I am pissed off at the cheap, crappy quality of this thing. Edit: Merchant contacted me about getting a refund. I told them "Sure, but I'm not taking the review down and I'm not paying for the return shipping." Haven't heard from them since.
wall.title: Chinese Junk

wall.text: THE BITCH in Les Edgerton's novel hounds Jake, Edgerton's matter-of-fact narrator, from chapter one to the very last page. And along the way, Edgerton makes sure we get to know the bitch real well. For the most part, the story takes place outside of prison, on the bricks, but the joint casts its shadow large from the moment Jake's former cellmate calls him out of the blue. Walker Joy is a cruel oxymoronic name for a guy who brings a shit storm into Jake's life--a good life he'll do anything to protect. In a jocular passionate voice, Jake leads the reader step by rational step into dark corners completely foreign to your average "civilian". The horrific decisions Jake has to make would be much less believable if it weren't for Edgerton's masterful hand. Given what's at stake, it's hard to argue with the path Jake takes--even as the grotesque results pile deeper by the page. This is the kind of book you're going to reach for at 3:30 in the morning because whatever crap is disturbing your sleep won't stand a chance against the terror looming in the next chapter. THE BITCH doesn't rely on bad luck or cheap device to create drama. Nothing pops out of the closet when it oughn't. Jake plays the cards he's dealt. It's a lousy hand and he does all he can to make it better. He's got optimism, criminal skill, and solid execution. He even gets a
wall.title: Straight up, hard, and dark

wall.text: rating: 4.75--mommy dearest is a bitch--stars I absolutely loved Second Chance Romance! I was hooked from the start and it didn't disappoint. It will make you smile, cry, scream, shout, swoon, and want to reach inside your screen and bitch slap the mother of all bitches of a mother! The story of Jules and Noah begins when they are just children. They lived next door to each other and became instant friends and spent all their time together. Jules home life wasn't stable and one particular night it became a house that was scary and so she ran to the one person she could rely on--Noah. From that night on she stayed with Noah at night and their friendship and love grew. Noah--even as a child--always protected and made Jules feel safe. He loved her from the start. Noah **sigh** is just too perfect for words. I <3 Noah! Cue the Bitch!! Abigail gets the award for worst mother ever! Divorced from Jules' dad she dated often and didn't give a crap about Jules or the type of men she exposed her daughter too. She always put her down and never did anything that would make you think she ever wanted her but Abigail wasn't about to give her up. Jules = money. If she gave Jules away then she would be cut off from the support that she got from Jules absent father. So she kept her around and made her life miserable. Abigail is a jealous woman who--
wall.title: You'll smile, cry, scream, shout, & swoon Awesome read!

wall.text: As a tuner, it's pretty kick ass, I looked at a lot of different models of tuners, yet finding an accurate tuner is trouble some, they mostly get you in the range but you really need to tune your ears to find the right intonation and tone. I couldn't find a decent head stock tuner worth a damn and a half! Cheap droppings of plastic crap if you ask me... And I have had a lot of cheap tuners! I realized the reality that even the pricier ones have gotten some complaints in the rear department for being cheap as well.... Then while scrolling through Amazon I found this tuner for about 25 bones, and I can honestly say that it's the most accurate stand alone tuner you can find in that given price range, sure you can spend more money on something else, but this will do the job of getting you in, or damn near to tune! So why pay out the ass to half ass it when you can do it for less? I gave the Korg TM50BK only 4 Stars because one, the metronome, well, it's pretty much useless to me, can't even hear the damn thing? The other reason why it lost a star was because right after I ordered it, I found out that they had one with a built in linear recorder!!!... Well that just pissed me off, naw meeen! I could have used that feature for practice and it would have come in handy so I would recommend you get the one with the linear recorder so you can keep track of how crapp
wall.title: OMG! It Tunes!

wall.text: Stay away from this sham company and their crap. They are themselves the damn virus. I have their antivirus installed on my PC. Recently, it got infected with some crappy trojan. It is really annoying. It keeps generating pop ups that beep for extra annoying effect and the dialog says "Trojan.Win32.Generic" detected. If you click anywhere on that dialog it will take you to a site that will really mess your PC up. I called Avast and complained that this trojan infected my system and that Avast does not even see it. If I run a scan it tells me everything is fine. Believe this or not, their rep claimed that this trojan is not infecting Windows, it is infecting Chrome and for a payment of $400 they would help me get rid of it. What a scam. Unbelievable. I call them for help and they try to scam me like this. They are the damn virus that we warn people about. This company is a virus itself trying to scam people. Well guess what AVAST. I was subscribing to some additional premium cleanup of theirs and paying them an annual installment to provide this supposed security. But after this episode, I cancelled my premium crap with them and will not ever touch this company with any PC that I have control over.
wall.title: Horrible Company and Product

wall.text: What a pos! Seriously, no machine has ever managed to anger me more than this thing. I'm not the biggest morning person. I make my coffee to relax and get me started on my day, it's supposed to be my me time like it is for most people. Well this machine does nothing but further piss me off. Seriously, look at the other reviews, this machine is GARBAGE. Sure, it does make good coffee when it decides to work, but that's probably one time for the other 20 times it decides to be a complete moron. It just took me 25 minutes, 25 damn minutes, to make one cup of coffee. The sad part is that this is the norm. Once in a blue moon it decides to work flawlessly, but that's rarer than a 15 year old girl to go a day without any mood swings. The programming on this machine is utter crap, there are kids just starting out in programming that can program a better machine. Krups should be ashamed for even releasing such a crap product. Don't buy this, seriously, just don't. It's an utter garbage machine, just look at the other reviews. I will NEVER buy another krups product in my life. They've shown me what type of company they are, they frankly don't give a crap about their products. Look elsewhere.
wall.title: Stay away! Far away!

wall.text: Dirty Bastard(Grim Bastards 1) Wow!!!! Trix and Boz are amazing and hot!!! I absolutely loved this book from page 1. Trix is the daughter of different clubs president. Boz is the president of the Grim Bastards. Boz wants her for himself and what Boz wants, he most definitely will get. The chemistry that these two have is electric! I can not wait to read the rest of this series!!!! Filthy Bastard(Grim Bastards 2) We first met Brew and Addy in Dirty Bastard, I loved how they were together from the start. He calmed her from the beginning. I didn't think I would like this book as much but I loved it more..... The past that would have torn other people made them better together. It had everything I look for in a great book.... Laughs, tears, happy and sad. And let's not forget really good sex!!!! I will definitely be recommending this book to all of my friends!!!!! And I look forward to the rest of the series!!!!!!! Guilty Bastard(Grim Bastards 3) At first I wasn't sure whether I wanted to punch Round or beat him.... My heart broke for Lisa. But as the story went on, you couldn't help fall in love with them both. I CAN NOT wait for Nasty to come out!!!! Another winner!! Nasty Bastard(Grim Bastards 4) Nasty Bastard by Emily Minton and Shelley Springfield is the 4th book in the Grim Bastards MC Series.
wall.title: An amazing series all in one box set!!!!

wall.text: Let me just say I was super excited about this product because it worked for the 1st couple of months. Then the manufacturer didn't put out any type of warning but there is an issue with black flakes from the painted interior of the pipes in the motor going into your hot tub. Now it doesn't say if it's super healthy or not to be sitting in that crap but I assume not.. Intex sent me a replacement motor because of this and they knew that it's an issue.. But the replacement motor was a refurbished motor and was leaking water almost instantly when I plugged it in. I tried contact them, but by the time they finally got back to me my warranty expired on their crappy replacement piece. After trying to look at it myself I got electrocuted and tried calling them back. A supervisor contacted me back and said their supervisor will call me. 2 months later I'm sitting here waiting for a phone call and super pissed off, out of a lot of money for this pile of crap purchase. Don't waste your money it's not worth it .

wall.text: So I'm a cheap bastard, and I've been buying $30 pond lights for years. So 2 of my lights have been out again and i don't really know for how long. all I know is that it's annoying to have to keep screwing around with them, also total p.i.t.a. to tie a rock to them and try and aim them. I bit the $100 bullet and finally bought these good brass lights. I was really happy when i unpackaged them by the weight and feel of quality, but also the way they daisy chained them together so i don't have to run more wire and more pain in the #@$ to get them going. I thought well that's nice, so far so good, well they have been in the pond a few days now and have GREAT lighting and the perfect color, not blue, not yellow just a perfect clean white, anyhow I just went out to the pond admiring the lights and decided to adjust them, well goddammed if they just didn't move and tilt exactly where i wanted them!!! wtf usually i would have never attempted such an adjustment as my rock might come untied and just make a mess out of things. It went so nice and smooth, NEARLY NO crap kicked up during the adjustment due to the weight and pivot that I thought, you know what these lights need a review on how great they are and to let the cheap sob's like me know to go ahead and splurge cause these lights will end up saving you money and a crap load of heartache in the long run. 12 months later
wall.title: 12 months later..... 1 light still works, 2 are out

wall.text: I've been collecting coins and using Littleton archive quality folders for a long time now, and this particular folder is different than most of the others I've used in that Littleton tried to get cheap and squeeze three rows of quarters on every page into one clear covering front and back....and this is a really stupid and crappy cheapskate design trying to save on another single row sheet. So why does this totally suck? When you place the quarters in the middle row of three, there isn't sufficient top and bottom pressure from the clear sheets to keep the quarters in their holes - which don't seem to be the consistent sized so some of the quarters just fall right through before you ever get to this other problem., so they fall out and disappear - stuck somewhere between the page's top covering and the cheap crap cardboard they didn't size correctly to keep the quarters in place...so now, several of my uncirculated quarters I had on pages with this idiot design have become scratched and marred, with their once pristine and clean surfaces looking like I got my coins out of a vending machine...and I'm pissed about. If you want to scratch up and mar your pristine coins, buy this piece of trash and you're on your way. This folder is pure junk. I bought this to replace a worn out Whitman folder that also used transparent sheets - but their design wasn't cheap stupid crap and it
wall.title: If you want to ruin your coins, buy this piece of trash and see what happens

The mattress is crap-tastic. It is so thin and unsupportive and you can feel the bars through it. AND it was missing one of the animals that dangle.. this is not worth the money. And it certainly wasn’t worth the time it took to assemble it and then did-assemble it. 100% returning this. Seriously look else where.

wall.text: This is the worse product I have ever come across. I bought this thing a year ago for our second car because I was stupid enough to buy the snug and ride car seat to bgein with. This design is completely flawed as it pertains to the the belt and how the seat fastens to the car seat. Its basically a seatbelt with a crappy plastic button that you have to push to loosen the belt if you eve decide to remove this base. The problem is that there is no human strong enough to a) tighten this belt appropriately or b) remove it. I have this damn thing installed in my car and I need to take it out. I have tried to use a wrench to push the darn button down so that I can possibly loosen the seat belt but to no avail. It seems the button no longer works and I may actually have to cut the seat belt in order to remove. I know this is a piece of crap because we have another car seat that our friend gave to us for our second child. That one is not made by Graco and it is simple to tighten and simple to remove. What a mistake this was. I'm at my wits end. I cant believe people buy this piece of crap! I would give it 5 negative stars if I could!
wall.title: CRAP!

wall.text: Stay away from this fridge. With all of the problems I have had, I will NEVER buy Whirpool family of products ever again. Read reviews, and issues before even considering this brand. It only lasted 2 years before problems started happening. First to go was the ice maker. I called a repairman out as the warranty had of course just ended. He said he could replace it for min. ~$300, but said he couldn't guarantee it would last. Then the deli drawer plastic hinge broke. That's just crappy design, plastic hinges?! Crap. Lastly is the constant leaking. The freezer leaks about 12-16 ozs of water all at once every few days. I researched this, and it is common problem, basically the condensing unit's drain freezes, causing excess water from condensation to not drain into the drain pan where it should evaporate, but buildup in the bottom of the freezer which creates an ice damn, and then spills on your floor. Piece of crap, stay away
wall.title: Poorly designed, many faults and not reliable.

wall.text: The box in which this model airplane comes is just horrific. So poorly made it's just like throwing all the sh*t in there because they don't give a damn. There were two plastic bags inside the shipping box, I assume to protect the package itself. They were empty so I guess they were protecting... I don't know? Maybe it was my mistake for not reading carefully the details of this product but I honestly thought the plane was already finished. But no, you have to put it together, piece by piece. That wouldn't have mattered to me because that's actually fun if the model airplane doesn't look like crap. Everything looks gray and made of poor plastic. The box shows a beautiful P-51 but inside there is a crappy plane you have to put together. Good luck while taking the pieces off the bunch. They don't even give you some sort of tool to do that. Also good luck while putting it together because not even glue is included. You have to go through all the trouble of getting all this to assemble a POS. Besides the POS you get, there are some stickers that I assume you are supposed to put on the plane once it is done. But it doesn't really make a difference because the plane really does look like crap in my opinion. No details, just plastic. In conclusion, it really sucks. Not buying this again. What a way to throw my money away. However if you like assemblin
wall.title: Regret just after opening the box

wall.text: If I could give this product zero stars I would. I have read some of the other reviews and they are not all correct, at least from my point of view. I also bought this product at a craft store and paid more than half of the price less than on Amazon. CAUTION: do not use this product on irreplaceable items. I did and I am pissed. Hence why I am on here. The product will not do mug more than 5 t-shirts and 4 adult size cotton socks. That was will average saturation. The sprayer on the bottle just decides to quick sometime during the use of the product. This happened with 3 different bottles. Also the crappy ass gloves that this product comes with are cumbersome and have holes, my hands still got stained. The color lasts for days. I am glad that I didn't pay more that $17 for this stupid thing. What I am mad about is the fact that I ruined good white items that j wanted stained certain colors. The bottles drip making irreversible color spots where you don't want them!! BUYER DEFINITELY BE WARE!!! Tips: to make the product last longer, when the bottle gets half way low, refill it with water to make it last longer. Also note that the product does loss some of its "stain power" after it sits for more than an hour. I recommend buying some cheap rubber gloves and spray your items that way. This damn thing pissed me off!
wall.title: Buyer be ware!!!

wall.text: I'm a complete novice and have enjoyed learning how to use these pens using the tutorial videos. (By the way, these are free on YouTube, so... you don't actually have to buy the pens to access these if you'd like to see for yourself.) I only have to deduct one star because the tutorial PAPER they give you is such CRAP. In fact it's SO crappy that it's almost impossible to get the same results as what's shown in the videos. It has a texture to it that makes blending really difficult, and it seems to soak up the color so fast that you have to go over and over the same spot again and again to get a vibrant color. The tutorial videos show smooth paper that accepts the ink well, and doing a few tests myself, I can confirm that smooth (even cheap, not great) watercolor paper does much better with these pens. According to other youtube videos, it doesn't seem like this textured paper was always what was provided... So, just know that the crappy results you get on the tutorials isn't You, it's the damn paper. I did other tests on smooth paper and it came out great. Still, the tutorials provide a great intro to using these. Have fun!
wall.title: Great pens, Fun tutorials!

wall.text: This is a 65 year old white guy in Texas. This is one of the finest handcrafted pieces of leather that I have ever had and it goes on a damn dog. I wish I could wear at myself. The quality is stellar and definitely a five-star. I saw that somebody reviewed it as it fell apart, BS. That person should not be allowed to leave a review because it just misleads people. This lady makes a fine product and I wish her the best. If anybody would bitch about this quality leather than they would bitch about anything. You all out there don't listen to anybody with any kind of negative issue because it just could not be true. Some people just can't be satisfied no matter what. You all step up and buy this lady's merchandise and tell anybody else the same. I love the product and definitely give it the highest rating possible because that's what it deserves. She even got the order on a Friday before Labor Day and got it to the shipper on that day. I received it the day after Labor Day because of her hard work ,honesty and integrity. I wish this person to best. It really does piss me off that anybody would have give any other than a five-star. Thank you very much for your help.
wall.title: Unbelievably good product

wall.text: Originally, this was a great part. Just after the return window expired, I began to experience another leaking from the same region in the Taurus. I noticed that coolant was seeping around the bottom hose that attaches to that plastic manifold in the back of the assembly. Now it's actually leaking through the plug in the bottom and the leak is worse than before. DO NOT BUY THIS PART. GO OEM, IT IS WORTH THE EXTRA BUCKS. Honestly, screw this part and the people that made it so inferior. I am so pissed off, I live paycheck to paycheck and just because of some asshat engineer I'm now stuck wasting another Saturday replacing this damn thing and wasting another $100. Thanks Amazon for selling a terrible product and thanks for absolutely NOTHING Dorman! -------------------------------------------------------------------------- It fits just the same as the old one 2001 Ford Taurus SES 24v. I would recommend replacing the thermostat while you're in there to save that from failing and having to remove all this crap again. It's easier if you remove the air box and the battery as well. On another note, this guy does an amazing write up on the part that usually fails (mine was the same, the degas coupling which Ford does NOT sell separate from the assembly and charges like $200 for the whole damn thing) and he invents his own part after
wall.title: It's a piece of SH*T

wall.text: This is stupid, has no memory foam in it that I can tell. It's just a heavy pad. Gel is good for stopping vibration not for support. Pretty sure the ratio of gel to foam should be reversed. This pad may be slightly useful on a completely flat, not curved, surface. Sadly it's made for motorcylces which have CURVED SADDLES! I swear, this thing HAD to have been made by people who have never even touched a motorcycle; much less owned one. Worse than the product though, which I kept to put my computer chair. The company accepts returns BUT you have to pay the $28 shipping. THEN they charge you a 25% "restocking fee". So it will cost you $50 to return this item. At that point you're better off not giving it back to them. Fuck them. Fucking crooks. Terrible store, will never buy from again. All in all, I guess you could cut it up into shoe insoles, fuck. Maybe I'll try that. But I can't imagine ANY other use for this piece of crap. Certainly nothing to do with a motorcycle.
wall.title: Does nothing

wall.text: Actual Rating: 2.5 I was feeling generous, so... It was good, I suppose. It was hot but these days it's not enough to just be hot. There needs to be good developments and substance in the characters, at least for me. I can overlook cliches, cheesiness and lack of an actual substance in the plot but it pisses me off when characters are crappy. Sydney has absolutely no respect for Kyler. She degrades him and insults him and calls him a man-slut and ohmYGOD. I don't understand how she tells herself that this is love. You have no idea how many times she's made comments about the fact that they wouldn't be in all kinds of shit if Kyler could just keep his dick in his pants, for once. She goes on and on about how if it breathes and walks, then Kyler is going to stick his dick in that. I'm not even kidding. I'm not exaggerating. For someone she claims to love, she sure does expects the absolute worst in him and doesn't even give him the opportunity to explain himself and pop the delusional bubble she's trapped herself in. Kyler is far from the victim though. He is so possessive of her. Like I can understand how that can be sometimes hot but not the way it was with him. He gets batshit cray when guys talk to Sydney. Even if the guys are completely normal, friendly non-creepers, he will drive anyone with a peni
wall.title: Alright...

wall.text: Honestly except for the awesome camera in a lot of ways I liked my GS3 way better. The screen on my S7 seems to have a really crappy calibration, it is always opening stuff if I look at it sideways or move my hand around it when it's just sitting on my desk, so I have to put it face down, even though I don't have gestures on, and when I actually press an app shortcut, it's all like "Um, duh, THIS app? Press again a few more times so I'm sure...". Dumb piece of crap. The camera is the only reason I have kept it, but on one of the updates they seemed to mess up the reliability of the autofocus on the screen, so I can't see it actually focus some times, and when I try to do macro, when I touch the spot I want it to focus on, that's where it goes all blurry! It focuses in then goes BLUR. I have to press several times to get it to go "Oh, HERE". It also has a HORRIBLE shutter lag! Way worse than the GS3, even though it's a faster chip with way more RAM. Plus voice to text STILL CAN'T DO PUNCTUATION!!! Way back like over four years ago, I had a phone that would do punctuation from the spoken word. WHY IS IT NOW IMPOSSIBLE????!!!! I get so frustrated trying to do dictation I end up yelling at it DON'T SPELL OUT "COMMA", ass****, you KNOW EXACTLY WTF I MEAN"!!! I mean crap, I had a phone that knew question marks and exclamation points. Now if I f
wall.title: WHY? WHY can't it just do its job??

wall.text: I’ve used and loved regular rainx for probably 20 years and this crap is horrible and unsafe! It leaves a nearly unremovable haze on windows! The first time I didn’t think it could be the rainx, thought there must have been something I didn’t see one the window that became visible after the treatment. I just treated another car and the same crappy, dangerous haze is on my windows. I’m pissed that I need to spend a couple hours of my life to remove this garbage! Last time I had to use a scouring pad with dish soap followed by degreaser then brake cleaner and a whole lot of elbo grease so I could see clearly out of my windows again. Regular rainx works great but I will never even buy that again-once I get this crap off I’ll find another rain repellent. Note that this haze seems to show up mostly in humid, foggy conditions-like most summer nights in South Florida.
wall.title: Don’t use this-leaves near unremovable haze on windows!
